title: The KIDS Act is way worse than digital carding — it is a mass surveillance system
summary: The fact that lawmakers are even contemplating a bill that would create a surveillance and censorship regime should be a wake-up call for everyone who values privacy and free expression, argues Electronic Frontier Foundation's India McKinney.

title: BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy in group pledging $15 million to prepare Bitcoin for quantum threats
summary: Members will direct funding independently, with the consortium taking no role in Bitcoin governance or protocol decisions.

title: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Capital joins tokenization push as Coinbase takes stake in onchain fund
summary: The sovereign wealth-backed asset manager tapped KAIO to bring one of its private market funds onchain across Base, Solana and Sui networks.

title: Polymarket to challenge France’s nationwide website block
summary: France’s regulator has said the platform still promoted illegal gambling and cited loss, identity-check and market-manipulation risks.

title: Bulls face a test unlike anything in bitcoin's 17-year history
